sections.sectionTitle: Israel mite in Biakna Paipih ding

verses.text: Topa in Moses kiangah
“Amaute in kei-a' dingin biakna hong paipihna dingin Israel mite' kiangah gen in. A pia nuam mi peuhmah tung panin kei-a' dingin biakna na sang ding hi
Amaute' tung panin na san' ding biakna hih bang ahi hi: Kham, ngun, sumngo
a dum, a dupsan, a ausan puante leh a kopin a kikhuk khau tawh a kigan puan hoih, keelmul
a kisansak tuutal vunte, keelvunte, singkha sing
meivakte-a' ding sathau, nilh sathau ding leh paknamtui dingin a namtui nate
siampipuan leh awmdal-a bulh dingin onik suangte ahi hi
Amaute' lakah kei ka om theihna dingin kei-a' dingin biakbuk khat amaute bawlsak in
Biakbuk leh a nazatte' lim ding tawh kisai-in nang' tungah kong lahte khempeuh tawh kituakin nangmah in na bawl ding hi.
“Amaute in singkha sing tawh singkuang khat bawl ding uh hi. A dung pi thum leh letmat kua, a vai pi nih leh letmat thum, a san'na pi nih leh letmat thum hi ding hi
Nangmah in kham citak tawh tua singkuang na zut ding a, a sung leh a pua na zut ding hi. A tung kimkotah a geihual kham tawh na bawl ding hi
Nangmah in tua singkuang-a' dingin kham kual li sungin a singkuang khe li tungah tuate na bulh ding a, a pang khatah kual nih, a pang langkhatah a kual nih mah na bulh ding hi
Nangmah in singkha singzawl na sui ding a, tuate kham tawh na zut ding hi
Singkuang puakna dingin singkuang panga kualte sungah a zawlte na khum ding hi
Singkuang' kualte sungah a zawlte omsuak ding a, tuate kilakhialo ding hi
Nang' tunga kong piak ding thuciamna nangmah in singkuang sungah na koih ding hi
“Tua ciangin kham citak tawh hehpihna tokhom khat na bawl ding a, a dung pi thum leh letmat kua, a vai pi nih leh letmat thum hi ding hi
Nangmah in kham tawh kherub nih na bawl ding a, hehpihna tokhom mong tuakah a kiseek tua kherub-te na omsak ding hi
Mong khatah kherub khat, a mong langkhatah kherub khat mah bawl in. Hehpihna tokhom tawh a kizomin a mong tuakah kherub na bawl ding hi
Kherub-te in a khate uh a tungah zal ding uh a, amau' khate tawh hehpihna tokhom liimsunin amaute khatlekhat kimaingat ding uh hi. Hehpihna tokhom lamah kherub-te' mai nga ding uh hi
Singkuang tungah hehpihna tokhom na koih ding a, singkuang sungah nang kong piak ding thuciamna na koih ding hi
Hehpihna tokhom tung, thuciamna singkuang tunga om kherub nihte kikal panin nang kong hopih ding a, Israel mite-a' dingin nang' tungah kong piak ding thute khempeuh nang' tungah kong gen ding hi.
“Nangmah in singkha sing tawh sabuai khat na bawl ding a, a dung pi thum, a vai pi khat leh alang, a san'na pi nih leh letmat thum hi ding hi
Kham citak tawh na zut ding a, a kimkotah a geihual kham tawh na bawl ding hi
Nangmah in khutpeek cia a zai zawl peek khat a kimkotah na bawl ding a, tua zawl peek kimkotah a geihual na bawl ding hi
Nangmah in tua sabuai-a' dingin kham kual li na bawl ding a, tuate pen a kiu li, a khe lite-ah na gak ding hi
Sabuai puakna ding zawlte a len dingin a zawl peek gei-ah a kualte om ding hi
Nangmah in singkha sing zawlte bawlin kham tawh na zut ding a, hihte tawh sabuai kipua ding hi
Paknamtui-a' dingin a kuangdaite leh a pakante, tui phihna dingin a thawl gongbakte, leh a kuang-ukte na bawl ding hi. Kham citak tawh tuate na bawl ding hi
Keima mai sabuai tungah Ompihna Anlum na koih tawntung ding hi.
“Kham citak tawh meivakkhuam khat na bawl ding hi. Meivakkhuam bul leh a kungte pen a kiseek nate tawh kibawl ding hi. A haite, a nunte leh a pakte, tua tawh sakhat hi khawm ding uh hi
A pang panin hiang guk meengkhia ding a, a pang khatah meivakkhuam hiang thum meengkhia-in, a pang langkhatah meivakkhuam hiang thum mah meengkhia ding hi

Hiang khat ciat tungah a nun leh a pak a om, almond gah tawh a kibang hai thum leh adang hiang khat ciat tungah a nun leh a pak a om, almond gah tawh a kibang hai thum mah kibawl ding hi. Tua ahih ciangin hiang gukte meivakkhuam panin meengkhia ding hi
A meivakkhuam tung mahmahah a nunte leh a pakte tawh a om, almond bangin a kibawl hai li omin
meivakkhuam panin hiang guk a kopte' bulah tua tawh sakhat ahi nun khat om ding hi
Amau' nunte leh a hiangte, sakhat hi ding a, a vekpi-in kham citak a kiseek sakhat hi ding hi
Nangmah in ama-a' dingin meivak sagihte na bawl ding a, ama omna mai teng khua a vaksak dingin meivakte kikoih ding hi
A taitehte leh a kuangte kham citak hi ding hi
Kham citak tawi sawmnih leh tawi khat val a gik tawh hih nazatte khempeuh kibawl ding hi
Mualtungah nang' tunga hong kilak hih nate pen amau' lim ding bangin na bawl ding thei in.
